creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
cygnus has changed the location of newlib. Other cross development ports
(crossgo32, for example) may be affected as well.

Fix: 

Please replace
     ftp://ftp.cygnus.com/pub/newlib/
with
     ftp://sourceware.cygnus.com/pub/newlib/
How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/devel.html#crosssco
